raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year> i checked-in into a hotel with checkout date of XX/XX/year>. 

At checkout the merchant released the hold of {$68.00}. 

On XX/XX/year>- Citi released {$18.00} back to my credit card. 

I contacted Citi customer service on XX/XX/XXXX to know the reason for the partial refund. 

A complaint # XXXX Was filed. 

XX/XX/year> the remaining {$50.00} is still on hold with citi bank falsely claiming that the merchant or their bank are the one holding on to said funds. 

After speaking with a Citi bank manager XXXX, I contacted the merchant whom sent by email proof of refund in the amount of {$68.00} in XXXX transaction. 

Citi agents and supervisors are falsely claiming it will take them XXXX  days to release the funds with no valid reason. 

Hence I was left no choice then to file a complaint against them for excessive delay XXXX XXXX XXXX Supervisor, - Manager XXXX
